# Week 2 Standup

## Summary

Quick Week 2 sync — backend on track, frontend record button polish landing tomorrow. Decided to keep AAC over Apple Lossless for the MVP audio format. Jerry to ship the recording flow before Friday demo.

## Action Items

- [ ] Jerry: Ship the recording flow (Due: 2026-05-30)
- [ ] Alex: Backend API freeze

## Key Decisions

- Use AAC 44.1 kHz mono 96 kbps for MVP audio (no Apple Lossless).
- Skip mainland China launch until v1.2 — regulatory clearance first.
